text: In the first scene, I feel a sense of calm and anticipation amid the emptiness. The bright lighting and open space evoke a mood of possibility, as if the room is awaiting an event or performance. In the second scene, surrounded by vibrant colors and the visual energy of innovation, I feel intellectually awakened and curious. The words on the wall and the interactive displays stimulate my mind, inviting me to reflect on the interplay of technology, research, and creativity.
